---
title: "Day 9: Naples Full Day"
subtitle: "MANN Museum & City Exploration"
date: "2026-06-13"
day-of-week: "Friday"
location: "Naples"
categories: [itinerary, naples, museums]
---

## Overview

**Last full day in Naples:** MANN museum (if not done yesterday), Cappella Sansevero, city exploration, farewell to southern Italy

---

## Morning: Museums (9 AM-1 PM)

**Priority 1: MANN Museum** (if not done yesterday)

**See:** [Museums - MANN](../research/museums.qmd#mann)

- Allow 2-3 hours
- Highlights: Pompeii/Herculaneum treasures, Farnese Collection, Alexander Mosaic, Secret Cabinet
- Now you understand context from seeing Herculaneum!

**Priority 2: Cappella Sansevero**

**See:** [Museums - Cappella Sansevero](../research/museums.qmd#cappella-sansevero)

- **Book timed entry** if not done
- Veiled Christ (one of world's most astonishing sculptures)
- 30-45 minutes
- No photography (seriously enforced)

**Do Both if Possible:**
- MANN morning (9-12)
- Cappella Sansevero late morning/early afternoon (12:30-1:30)

---

## Afternoon: Spaccanapoli & Historic Center (2-6 PM)

**Spaccanapoli:**
- Ancient straight street through historic Naples
- Follows 2,400-year-old Greek city plan
- Churches, shops, street vendors, local life

**Must-See:**
- Gesù Nuovo (Baroque church)
- Santa Chiara (monastery, beautiful cloister)
- San Domenico Maggiore (Gothic church)

**Experience:**
- Street food vendors
- Nativity workshops (Naples famous for presepi)
- Hanging laundry, narrow alleys
- Authentic Naples chaos

**Via dei Tribunali:**
- Parallel to Spaccanapoli
- More pizza options
- Underground Naples tours start here

---

## Late Afternoon: Waterfront (5-7 PM)

**Lungomare (Waterfront Promenade):**
- Via Partenope and Via Caracciolo
- Vesuvius views across bay
- Castel dell'Ovo (seaside castle)
- Cleaner, prettier than centro storico
- Escape from chaos

**Activities:**
- Sunset walk
- Photos of Vesuvius
- Gelato on promenade

---

## Evening: Farewell Naples (7-10 PM)

**Final Dinner:**
- Return to favorite pizzeria? (3rd pizza in 3 days?)
- Or seafood on Lungomare
- Trattoria in Quartieri Spagnoli

**After Dinner:**
- Final gelato/sfogliatella
- Evening stroll
- **Pack for Puglia train tomorrow**

---

## Prepare for Tomorrow

**Train to Brindisi/Puglia:**
- Check departure time (likely morning)
- Pack completely tonight
- Set alarm for checkout
- Long train ride (5-6 hours) - bring entertainment, snacks

---

**Previous:** [Day 8](day-08-2026-06-12-naples-herculaneum.qmd) | **Next:** [Day 10: Naples to Brindisi](day-10-2026-06-14-naples-to-brindisi.qmd)
